'''Lord High Admiral''' was a military title and rank which [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] believed that the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Blitzer Harrsk|Harrsk]] had awarded himself.

==Behind the scenes==
In [[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']], the rank of "Lord High Admiral" is attributed to Harrsk only in Leia's thoughts, where she thinks of him as "the self-styled Lord High Admiral Harrsk" and later simply as "[[High Admiral]] Harrsk". He is also referred to as "[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] Harrsk" by [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], and as "[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] Harrsk" by [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' also refers to Harrsk as a "Lord High Admiral".
